meta.summary: HiCExplorer command-line suite for processing, normalizing, analyzing, converting, and visualizing Hi-C, capture Hi-C, and Micro-C contact matrices.
meta.description: HiCExplorer command-line suite for processing, normalizing, analyzing, converting, and visualizing Hi-C, capture Hi-C, and Micro-C contact matrices.

test: hicexplorer --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'hicBuildMatrix' >/dev/null && hicexplorer --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'hicPlotMatrix' >/dev/null && hicexplorer --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'chicViewpoint' >/dev/null

hicInfo --version 2>&1 | grep -F '3.7.6' >/dev/null && hicBuildMatrix --version 2>&1 | grep -F '3.7.6' >/dev/null && hicBuildMatrixMicroC --version 2>&1 | grep -F '3.7.6' >/dev/null && hicConvertFormat --version 2>&1 | grep -F '3.7.6' >/dev/null && hicPlotMatrix --version 2>&1 | grep -F '3.7.6' >/dev/null && chicViewpoint --version 2>&1 | grep -F '3.7.6' >/dev/null

hicBuildMatrix --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && hicBuildMatrixMicroC --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && hicCorrectMatrix --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && hicPlotTADs --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null && hicConvertFormat --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'usage:' >/dev/null
python -c 'import hicexplorer, hicmatrix, cooler, pybedtools, pyBigWig, pysam, sklearn, matplotlib, graphviz'
samtools --version | grep -F 'samtools 1.23.1' >/dev/null && bedtools --version | grep -F 'v2.31.1' >/dev/null && dot -V 2>&1 | grep -F 'graphviz' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hicexplorer-rest && cd /tmp/taf-hicexplorer-rest && printf '>chr1\nAAAAGATCAAAAGATCTTTT\n' > genome.fa && hicFindRestSite --fasta genome.fa --searchPattern GATC --outFile sites.bed && test -s sites.bed && grep -F 'chr1' sites.bed >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-hicexplorer-cool && cd /tmp/taf-hicexplorer-cool && python -c 'import cooler, pandas as pd; bins = pd.DataFrame({"chrom": ["chr1", "chr1"], "start": [0, 1000], "end": [1000, 2000]}); pixels = pd.DataFrame({"bin1_id": [0, 0, 1], "bin2_id": [0, 1, 1], "count": [5, 2, 3]}); cooler.create_cooler("tiny.cool", bins=bins, pixels=pixels, ordered=True)' && hicInfo --matrices tiny.cool | grep -F 'tiny.cool' >/dev/null && hicPlotMatrix --matrix tiny.cool --outFileName tiny.png >/dev/null && test -s tiny.png && hicConvertFormat --matrices tiny.cool --inputFormat cool --outputFormat h5 --outFileName tiny.h5 >/dev/null && test -s tiny.h5 && hicInfo --matrices tiny.h5 | grep -F 'tiny.h5' >/dev/null

upstream.name: HiCExplorer
upstream.citation: Wolff et al. 2020; Wolff et al. 2018; Ramirez et al. 2018
